user_system_path: Right-now cards: state-change triggers. Slice 1: copy/verbiage scrub changing morning brief/daily card terminology to Right Now; Slice 2: product changes to decouple card generation from clock.
allowed_files_raw: Public-facing copy and verbiage changes; user-facing component updates; e2e tests; blog and marketing content
forbidden_files_raw: No auth/stripe/billing work, no schema migrations, no API routes besides page rendering
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
required_browser_proof: Manual: load dashboard and verify Right Now copy appears; load public pages and verify landing page copy
acceptance_condition: All user-facing copy uses Right Now terminology instead of morning brief/daily card; landing page reflects state-change model, not time-based delivery; tests pass
stop_condition: Stop when copy scrub complete (Slice 1), verified on dashboard and public pages, tests pass, and ready for Slice 2 product changes
next_command: Slice 1 verification: load dashboard and public pages to confirm Right Now copy in place, then continue to Slice 2 product changes
